use_cases: Creating card-based layouts for displaying grouped information
Building dashboard sections with organized content containers
Designing product or service listings with consistent card styling
Constructing modal and dialog content areas with standard card structure
Building form sections with clear visual separation using card primitives
ai_summary: Primitive card components providing foundational UI building blocks for content containers. Supports header, title, description, content, and footer regions with consistent styling. Part of a standard component library for dashboard and content layout patterns.
